subject: Re:
body:
I expect you to come asap

----- Original Message ----
From: Catherine Derby <catherinederby@hotmail.com>
To: jeeproject@yahoo.com
Sent: Friday, February 2, 2007 12:50:45 PM
Subject: 

Hello Mr Epstein,

I'm still sick and it's driving me crazy sitting in this silent apartment!   
I go between my bed and a hot bath.

Being this sick again i've done a lot of wondering why my body have been 
more sick in the past 6 months than ever before.  I've come to a cause and a 
few months ago you questioned me about the very thing.  Although I denied 
it, I now see how it is physically affecting me.  Sitting in silence leaves 
you with nothing to do but think.

I wish I was able to go to the island but I havne't been out of bed since 
tuesday night.  I apologized to GM of course but I think she would be more 
upset if she got sick on her travels.  I asked her to throw things to do my 
way to take away this bordem!  You know me, I can't sit still.

I hope you are well.  I miss you!  Be well.  And thank you, you given me 
some really good advice and a good listener when I needed it.  Thank you.

Catherine
